risk_description: Failure of distributed transactions (Saga pattern) in the Payout Approval Workflow causing financial data inconsistency between local ledger and Stripe.
root_cause: Complexity of maintaining atomicity across NestJS microservices and external Stripe API without a two-phase commit protocol.
mitigation_strategy: Implement rigorous idempotency keys for all Stripe requests; Design automated reconciliation cron jobs to compare local DB state with Stripe state daily.
contingency_plan: Implement a manual administrative override UI to force-correct transaction states based on Stripe dashboard truth.
monitoring_trigger: Alert on any HTTP 5xx response from Stripe API or internal 'TransactionFailed' events in the Event Bus.

risk_description: AI hallucinations or extraction errors in SOW processing leading to incorrect project scope parameters or skill vector embeddings.
root_cause: Inherent probabilistic nature of LLMs (OpenAI) and variability in unstructured SOW document formats (PDF/DOCX).
mitigation_strategy: Implement strict JSON schema validation (e.g., Zod) on OpenAI outputs; Set low temperature parameters; Enforce Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) review step before finalizing SOW data.
contingency_plan: Fallback to manual data entry workflow if AI confidence score is below threshold.
monitoring_trigger: Track percentage of AI-processed fields modified by users during the review phase.

risk_description: PII leakage to OpenAI API due to failure in AWS Comprehend redaction step, violating GDPR/SOC 2 requirements.
root_cause: AWS Comprehend missing specific entity types or context-specific PII patterns in complex SOW documents.
mitigation_strategy: Implement regex-based pre-filtering alongside AWS Comprehend; Configure OpenAI enterprise privacy settings (zero data retention).
contingency_plan: Immediately rotate OpenAI API keys and trigger incident response protocol for data breach notification.
monitoring_trigger: Audit log alerts for detection of pattern-matched PII in outbound API payloads.

risk_description: Performance degradation in pgvector similarity searches as the volume of SOW embeddings grows, impacting matchmaking latency.
root_cause: Lack of appropriate indexing (IVFFlat/HNSW) on vector columns or insufficient memory allocation for RDS instance.
mitigation_strategy: Implement IVFFlat indexing immediately upon table creation; Configure read replicas for search operations.
contingency_plan: Migrate vector search workload to a dedicated vector database (e.g., Pinecone/Milvus) if Postgres vertical scaling hits limits.
monitoring_trigger: p95 query latency exceeding 200ms on vector search endpoints.

risk_description: Kubernetes (EKS) misconfiguration leading to deployment failures or inability to auto-scale under load.
root_cause: Complexity of Terraform modules for EKS, VPC CNI networking, and IAM OIDC integration.
mitigation_strategy: Use proven Terraform modules (e.g., terraform-aws-modules/eks); Implement GitOps with ArgoCD for declarative state management.
contingency_plan: Maintain a 'break-glass' manual kubectl access method; Document manual rollback procedures.
monitoring_trigger: Pod restart counts and node scaling latency alerts via Prometheus.

risk_description: Stripe Connect webhook failures causing desynchronization of vendor vetting status and payment capability.
root_cause: Network partitioning or service downtime preventing delivery of `account.updated` webhooks.
mitigation_strategy: Implement a webhook receiver with DLQ (Dead Letter Queue); Build a polling fallback to check account status periodically.
contingency_plan: Manually re-trigger webhook events via Stripe Dashboard during outages.
monitoring_trigger: Alert on webhook signature verification failures or processing timeouts.
